mapper.sql: A.NREQUEST_AS_SEQ, A.SREQUEST_AS_TYPE_CD, A.SREQUEST_AS_TYPE_NM, A.SCOMMENT , A.DCREATE_DT, A.SCREATE_ID, A.DMODIFY_DT, A.SMODIFY_ID

, B.SUSER_NM AS SCREATE_NM , C.SUSER_NM AS SMODIFY_NM , D.SREQUEST_AS_CTM , D.DCREATE_DT AS APY_DT , D.SCREATE_ID AS APY_USER_ID , E.SUSER_NM AS APY_USER_NM , D.SREQUEST_AS_OBJ_NM1 , D.SREQUEST_AS_OBJ_LLNUM1 , D.SREQUEST_AS_OBJ_NM2 , D.SREQUEST_AS_OBJ_LLNUM2
, A.SCREATE_NM , A.SMODIFY_NM , A.SREQUEST_AS_CTM , A.APY_DT , A.APY_USER_ID , A.APY_USER_NM , A.SREQUEST_AS_OBJ_NM1 , A.SREQUEST_AS_OBJ_LLNUM1 , A.SREQUEST_AS_OBJ_NM2 , A.SREQUEST_AS_OBJ_LLNUM2

, MST.TB_USER_BAS B , MST.TB_USER_BAS C , (SELECT A.NREQUEST_AS_APY_TXN_SEQ, A.NREQUEST_AS_SEQ, A.SREQUEST_AS_CTM , A.SREQUEST_AS_OBJ_NM1, A.SREQUEST_AS_OBJ_LLNUM1, A.DREQUEST_AS_OBJ_OPEN_DT1, A.SREQUEST_AS_OBJ_IP_BLOCK1 , A.SREQUEST_AS_OBJ_NM2, A.SREQUEST_AS_OBJ_LLNUM2, A.DREQUEST_AS_OBJ_OPEN_DT2, A.SREQUEST_AS_OBJ_IP_BLOCK2 , A.SREQUEST_AS_TYPE_CD, A.SAS_TPIC_NM, A.SAS_TPIC_ORG, A.SEXIST_SP_LINE , A.NEXIST_SALES, A.SALT_SP_LINE, A.NALT_SALES, A.DAPV_DT , A.SAPVUSER_ID, A.SCOMMENT , A.DCREATE_DT, A.SCREATE_ID, A.DMODIFY_DT, A.SMODIFY_ID FROM MST.TB_REQUEST_AS_APY_TXN A , ( SELECT NREQUEST_AS_SEQ , MAX(NREQUEST_AS_APY_TXN_SEQ ) AS NREQUEST_AS_APY_TXN_SEQ FROM MST.TB_REQUEST_AS_APY_TXN WHERE SREQUEST_AS_TYPE_CD = 'RS0202' GROUP BY NREQUEST_AS_SEQ ) B WHERE A.NREQUEST_AS_APY_TXN_SEQ = B.NREQUEST_AS_APY_TXN_SEQ ) D , MST.TB_USER_BAS E
AND A.SCREATE_ID = B.SUSER_ID(+) AND A.SMODIFY_ID = C.SUSER_ID(+) AND A.NREQUEST_AS_SEQ = D.NREQUEST_AS_SEQ(+) AND D.SCREATE_ID = E.SUSER_ID(+)
mapper.select: SELECT count(1) totalCount FROM MST.TB_REQUEST_AS_MST A
SELECT count(1) totalCount FROM MST.TB_REQUEST_AS_MST A
SELECT count(1) useCount FROM MST.TB_REQUEST_AS_MST A WHERE SREQUEST_AS_TYPE_CD = 'Y'
